hero.headline: V V AI Connects Enterprises and Individuals to Enable True Human–AI Collaboration and Co-creation
hero.subheadline: V V AI-Redefining Connections， Acting on Your Words.

pillars.title: Powering Every Dimension of Your World

work.label: Work
work.headline: One-Stop Smart Work Collaboration Platform
work.subline: V V AI frees managers from routine tasks by automating planning, execution, and tracking, delivering precise insights for strategic focus and team inspiration. For employees, it acts as an intelligent assistant—handling research, analysis, and drafting—so they can focus on creativity, critical thinking, and human connection, shifting from routine work to high-value innovation.

education.label: Education
education.headline: One-Stop AI-Powered Education Collaboration Platform for All Scenarios
education.subline: V V AI bridges home and school, creating a student-centered education ecosystem. It provides teachers with accurate learning analytic for personalized instruction, while giving parents timely, transparent updates on progress and evidence-based parenting advice—uniting both sides to support each child’s unique growth.

life.label: Life
life.headline: Your Personal and Reliable Smart Lifestyle Planner
life.subline: V V AI learns user habits and preferences, then seamlessly coordinates dining, transport, housekeeping, and other services. With one command (or even none), it understands intent and delivers exactly what’s needed—turning “what you want” into instant reality.

health.label: Health
health.headline: Your Reliable, Quick-Response Health Manager
health.subline: V V AI serves as an intelligent health coordinator, connecting personal data, medical knowledge, hospital experts, and rehab services. When needed, it matches the best resources—recommending departments, linking online doctors, or creating tailored plans—making high-quality care more accessible and efficient for everyone.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.headline: AI Intelligent Enterprise Management Platform
enterprise.sub: Innovating how Enterprises are Managed — Improving Operational Efficiency and Business Outcome
enterprise.body: Use V V to improve work efficiency between teams with an innovative and comprehensive collaboration and enterprise management platform.

individual.label: Individual
individual.headline: AI-Powered Personal Assistant
individual.sub: From task executor to decision enabler — From human-serving tools to people-centric services
individual.body: V V career assistant accumulates and assesses your skills and achievements, offering a holistic perspective of your professional journey.

items.title: Next-Generation AI Capabilities
items.body: A next-generation AI intelligence foundation, equipped with globally innovative multi-modal conversational interaction technologies and proprietary AI capabilities. Empowers enterprises with super-intelligent AI work agents, and individuals with AI super assistants.

items.title: Industry-Leading Internal-External Collaboration
items.body: A powerful platform architecture that seamlessly connects internal work collaboration with external business collaboration. Through unified workflows and efficient coordination, it enhances organizational execution.

items.title: Intelligent IM Communication Capabilities
items.body: End-to-end encrypted to ensure privacy and data security. Covers core business communication scenarios, enabling IM-based task execution, approvals, and information sharing with multi-language real-time translation.

items.title: Global Data Security & Compliance
items.body: A globally compliant data platform aligned with international standards, including GDPR. Certified under ISO 27001 and supported by a proprietary security protection framework.

platform.label: Platform
platform.title: V V AI Reimagines Enterprises and Individuals
platform.subtitle: Transforming Collaboration from Execution to Creation
bullets: A Fully Integrated AI-Powered Platform, connecting people, business, finance, and operations through intelligent collaboration
A Unified Workspace, enabling internal coordination and external operational execution with seamless integration

security.label: Security
security.title: Built on Trust, Designed for Scale

cards.title: Data Security & Technology Assurance
items: End-to-end data encryption enabling secure bidirectional data transmission
Protection against accidental deletion or loss with multiple backup methods
ISO 27001 certified, fully compliant with GDPR requirements
Protection against malicious attacks, anomalous requests, and high-risk operation alerts

7×24 daily customer support to ensure stable and continuous digital operations
Full lifecycle operational system support, enabling intelligent operational decision-making
Ongoing and growth-enablement services to support personalized long-term decision strategies

testimonials.label: Customers
testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Every customer's story and experience fuel our journey forward

t1.quote: V V AI integrates over 30 core enterprise management functions into a single platform with real-time data synchronization, making people, finance, and resource management unprecedentedly simple. It has saved me at least 30% of my time.

t2.quote: V V AI's educational space designed for institutions and families not only helped me increase course sales, but more importantly, it significantly improved the service experience for parents and students, leading to more referral enrollments. Teachers also find it very convenient—they can check class schedules, timetables, and students' attendance status anytime on the APP.

t3.quote: V V AI's office assistant is incredibly useful. It helps me organize daily to-do lists, meeting schedules, approval workflows, and more. I can chat with it anytime to discuss work ideas, and it often gives me very practical suggestions. It also quickly summarizes documents and writes reports for me—my work efficiency has improved a lot!

t4.quote: Because of work, I often have client entertainment needs. Through V V AI's life assistant, I can get creative ideas for hosting clients, it recommends nearby restaurants, and it even suggests the best travel times and transportation arrangements.

t5.quote: I downloaded V V AI on the recommendation of the training center. At first, I only used it to check my child's class schedule, but after using it, I found it can centrally manage the learning plans, bills, notifications, learning evaluations, classroom highlights, after-class homework, and periodic learning reports for all 3 of my children across different institutions. It's truly a treasure app for parents!

meta.title: Download V V AI
meta.description: Download V V AI for desktop and mobile, or open the official download center for all available installers.

hero.label: Download Center
hero.subtitle: Install V V AI across desktop and mobile in minutes.
hero.body: Choose your platform below to continue to the official V V AI download center, or book a guided setup demo with our team.

windows.name: Windows
windows.subtitle: Best for enterprise teams managing operations, approvals, and dashboards from desktop.

macos.name: macOS
macos.subtitle: Ideal for creative and cross-functional teams that need AI collaboration on macOS.

dialog.title: Download the Version That Suits Your Mac
dialog.description: V V AI is available for Mac computers with Intel chips and Apple chips. Using the correct chip version helps reduce resource consumption and improve software performance.
dialog.howToCheck: How to confirm your Mac computer chip type?
dialog.step1: Click the Apple menu icon in the upper left corner and select "About This Mac"
dialog.step2: In the "Overview", check if the processor is Intel (Intel) or Apple, and select the corresponding download version
dialog.noteText: If the version cannot be confirmed, download the Intel version directly

ios.name: iOS / iPadOS
ios.subtitle: Stay connected on the go with mobile approvals, messaging, and instant AI assistance.

android.name: Android
android.subtitle: Access your tasks, meetings, and assistants from any Android phone or tablet.

steps.one: Open the official download center and pick your platform.
steps.two: Install V V AI and sign in with your work or personal account.
steps.three: Enable notifications and sync to start collaborating instantly.

notes.one: Use the latest OS version for best performance and security.
notes.two: If your organization uses SSO, prepare your company login details.
notes.three: Need onboarding help? Book a demo and our team will guide setup.

meta.title: About V V AI — Our Story
meta.description: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. — Providing Intelligent AI-Driven Services Across Work, Education, Life, and Health from Singapore.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.body: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based AI company building intelligent services across Work, Education, Life, and Health — creating an AI era where services seamlessly transition from being sought to being enjoyed.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.body1: We believe AI should be proactive, not reactive. Our mission is to leverage AI concepts and technologies to deliver precise, intelligent services — creating a world where getting help is effortless.
mission.body2: Headquartered in Singapore, we build for the global enterprise market with a focus on APAC — bringing together Work, Education, Life, and Health into one seamlessly connected platform.
mission.quote: Providing Intelligent AI-Driven Services Across Work, Education, Life, and Health — Leveraging AI concepts and technologies to deliver precise, intelligent services, creating an AI era where services seamlessly transition from being sought to being enjoyed.

items.label: Founded
items.detail: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. established in Singapore

items.label: First Release
items.detail: V V Work Suite launched with 10 core modules

items.label: V V Work Suite 2.0
items.detail: Upgraded to 35+ core collaboration modules with multi-language support

items.label: Education Collaboration Platform
items.detail: Launched AI-driven one-stop education collaboration platform

items.label: Global Strategy Upgrade and V V AI Engine 2.0 Launch
items.detail: Next-generation multi-modal AI assistant fully rolled out, expanded to personal AI: Life services and health management

items.label: Upgraded V V Work Management and V V Education Collaboration to AI Agent-driven All-in-One Super Platform
items.detail: Accelerating APAC deployment — more regions coming soon

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We push the boundaries of what AI can do — building tools that think ahead, adapt to context, and deliver value before you ask.

items.title: Trust
items.description: ISO 27001 certified, GDPR compliant, end-to-end encrypted. We treat your data with the same care you would.

items.title: People
items.description: Technology should serve people, not the other way around. Every feature we build starts with a real human need.

items.title: Impact
items.description: From Singapore to the world — we measure success by the time we save and the connections we enable for millions of users.

cta.body: Whether you're an enterprise looking to transform operations or a curious individual — V V AI has a place for you.

meta.title: Pricing — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI uses a flexible enterprise pricing model. Contact our team for a custom quote tailored to your organisation's size and needs.

hero.label: Pricing
hero.body: V V AI is built for organisations of all sizes. Our pricing is customised to your needs — contact us for a tailored quote and we'll get back to you within one business day.

tiers.label: What's Included
tiers.title: Core features by suite
tiers.subtitle: Every suite is fully featured — no artificial feature gating.

contact.label: Enterprise Sales
contact.title: Let's build the right plan for you
contact.body: Our enterprise sales team will understand your use case, recommend the right suites and configurations, and provide transparent pricing — no surprises.
checks: Go live in as little as 7 days

items.q: Does V V AI publish fixed pricing?
items.a: No. V V AI is an enterprise platform and pricing is tailored to your organisation's size, selected suites, and integration requirements. Contact us for a custom quote.

items.q: Can I use multiple suites together?
items.a: Yes — V V AI suites are designed to work together seamlessly. Many organisations use Work + Education or Work + Life as part of an integrated platform deployment.
We offer guided product demos and proof-of-concept pilots for qualified organisations. Book a demo and our team will arrange the right evaluation experience for you.

items.q: How quickly can we get started?
items.a: With our dedicated implementation team, most organisations go live within 7 days of signing. We handle technical setup, data migration, and staff training.
All plans include 7×24 customer support, a dedicated success manager, and full lifecycle operational system support.

meta.title: Security & Compliance — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI is ISO 27001 certified and GDPR compliant. End-to-end encryption, 24/7 uptime, and enterprise-grade data protection.

hero.label: Security
hero.body: V V AI is built on a foundation of enterprise-grade security. From ISO 27001 certification to end-to-end encryption, your data is safe with us.

dataSecurity.label: Data Security & Technology Assurance
dataSecurity.title: Protection at every layer
dataSecurity.body: Multiple overlapping security measures ensure your organisation's data is always protected — from transmission to storage.

items.title: End-to-End Encryption
items.description: End-to-end data encryption enabling secure bidirectional data transmission. All messages, documents, and records are encrypted at rest and in transit.

items.title: Disaster Recovery & Backups
items.description: Protection against accidental deletion or loss with multiple backup methods and geographically distributed redundancy.

items.title: ISO 27001 Certified & GDPR Compliant
items.description: V V AI holds ISO 27001 certification and is fully compliant with GDPR requirements — meeting the highest international standards for information security management.

items.title: Threat & Anomaly Protection
items.description: Protection against malicious attacks, anomalous requests, and high-risk operation alerts. Real-time monitoring flags suspicious activity before it becomes a threat.

items.title: Granular Access Controls
items.description: Unauthorized access prevented with role-based permission controls. Administrators define exactly who can see, edit, or share every piece of data.

customerSuccess.label: Customer Success Service Assurance
customerSuccess.title: We're with you every step
customerSuccess.body: Security doesn't end at technology. Our customer success team ensures your deployment runs smoothly — and grows with you.

items.title: Go-Live in 7 Days
items.description: Rapid onboarding with dedicated implementation support — go live within 7 days and enable a seamless transition to digital management.

items.title: 7×24 Customer Support
items.description: 7×24 daily customer support to ensure stable and continuous digital operations. Your team is never on their own.

items.title: Full Lifecycle Support
items.description: Full lifecycle operational system support, enabling intelligent operational decision-making from deployment through ongoing optimization.

items.title: Long-Term Growth Enablement
items.description: Ongoing growth-enablement services to support personalized long-term decision strategies as your organisation scales.

compliance.title: ISO 27001 Certified · GDPR Compliant
compliance.body: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. holds ISO/IEC 27001 certification and maintains full compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation. Our information security management system is independently audited and continuously improved.

meta.title: Terms of Service — V V AI
meta.description: V V AI Terms of Service. Read our terms governing your use of V V AI products and services.

sections.heading: Important Notice
sections.body:
Before accessing or using any products or services operated and/or managed by V V Technology Pte Ltd and/or its affiliates (hereinafter "V V" or "we"), including the V V AI application software, websites (including vvai.com), hardware and related services and functions, please read carefully and comply with this Agreement (including the Service Agreement and Privacy Policy).

When you complete all registration procedures by filling in information on the registration page as prompted, reading and agreeing to this Agreement; or when you complete all activation procedures by filling in information on the activation page as prompted, reading and agreeing to this Agreement; or when you actually use our Services in any other manner permitted by V V, it means that you have fully read, understood and accepted all terms of this Agreement, which shall be legally binding. If you do not agree with all of these Terms, do not register for, activate, or use the Services.

sections.heading: I. Parties
sections.body: This Agreement is entered into between you (hereinafter "User" or "you") using V V Products or Services and us.

sections.heading: II. Content and Effectiveness of Agreement
sections.body:
2.1 The content of this Agreement includes the main body of the Agreement and the Privacy Policy, various policies, rules, statements, notices, warnings, tips, instructions (hereinafter collectively referred to as "Rules") that we have published or may publish in the future. The above Rules are an integral part of this Agreement and have the same legal effect as this Agreement.

2.2 V V reserves the right to revise this Agreement and related Rules from time to time as necessary. The revised Agreement and Rules will replace the original ones upon taking effect. You should regularly review this Agreement and related Rules to understand any changes. If you disagree with any revision, you shall immediately stop using V V's products or services; if you continue to use V V's products or services, it shall be deemed that you have agreed to accept the revised Agreement and Rules.

sections.heading: III. Service Contents
sections.body:
3.1 V V Products and Services include recruitment management, human resources and organization management, financial management and other technical functions. These functions may be optimized or modified according to changes in user needs, different service versions, or unilateral decisions of service providers, and may also be temporarily suspended due to regular or irregular maintenance.

3.2 V V will continuously improve the terminals, formats, etc., through which you use this Service. Once you have registered for one Service, you can use other Services through the same account. This Agreement automatically applies to your use of all versions of software and services (except for modules requiring separate payment).

3.3 V V has the right to change, upgrade, modify or transfer any part of the Services or their related functions and application software at its own discretion.

3.4 With written authorization from an enterprise organization, you can apply for an administrator account on behalf of that enterprise. After approval by V V, you can use that administrator account to upload and manage enterprise address books, and realize internal work interaction, collaborative office and other functions through V V's products or services.

sections.heading: IV. Registration & Account Management
sections.body:
4.1 You confirm that when you complete the registration procedure or otherwise actually use the Service in a manner permitted by V V Technology, you shall have full civil capacity and civil conduct capacity commensurate with the civil act you engage in. If you do not possess the aforementioned qualifications, please do not use the Service; otherwise you and your guardian (if applicable) shall bear all consequences arising therefrom, and V V has the right to cancel your account and reserve the right to pursue liability against you or your guardian.

4.2 You may register your account using a mobile phone number you provide or confirm, or through other methods permitted by V V. When registering, you shall provide authentic, accurate, complete and current identity and other relevant information. You understand and agree that your account name, avatar, profile and other information shall not contain illegal or inappropriate content, nor impersonate any person or entity, nor use anyone else's name without authorization.

4.3 You acknowledge and agree that ownership of any V V account (including client accounts and administrator accounts, if applicable) belongs exclusively to V V. Upon completion of registration, you only obtain the right to use the account, which is subject to the terms of this Agreement. The right of use is limited only to the initial applicant for registration and shall not be transferred or provided to others in any way. In case of violation of this provision, V V has the right to immediately terminate the provision of services and cancel the account.

4.4 Upon successful registration, V V will verify your identity based on your identity information and authorize login. "Identity information" includes but is not limited to your account name, password, SMS verification code, mobile phone number and ID information. You agree that V V may adopt different verification measures to verify your identity depending on different terminals and your usage habits. Please keep safe your account, password, SMS verification code and other information, and do not disclose them to others.

4.5 When you register for a V V account and use our products or services, we will collect personal information such as your name, gender, age, ID number, passport information, telephone number, email address, identity verification information, location information and log information, subject to your consent and as necessary for providing the services.

4.6 If you cancel your V V account or stop using the Service, V V has the right to handle account-related content and information (including but not limited to deletion) at its own discretion, without assuming any responsibility to you; if the account is an administrator account, V V has the right to cancel and delete that administrator account and all information and rights of address book members under that enterprise.

sections.heading: V. Usage Guidelines for Products and Services
VI. Service Fees
sections.body:
6.1 Any free trial function or Service shall not be deemed a waiver by V V of subsequent charging rights. V V will notify you of charging standards and methods by announcement within specific V V Service applications, or by telephone, SMS, email or other means. If you continue using relevant functions or Services, you must pay corresponding fees according to charging standards announced by V V.

6.2 All fees must be paid in advance through payment methods accepted by V V. The above usage fees do not include any other taxes, fees or related remittance expenses, which shall be borne by you separately.

6.3 V V has the right to unilaterally adjust fee standards and charging methods according to actual circumstances, and will notify you by announcement within relevant Service applications or by telephone, SMS, email or other means, without needing to obtain your prior consent. If you disagree with the charges, you shall immediately stop using the Service; continued use shall be deemed acceptance and obligation to pay fees.

sections.heading: VII. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.body:
7.1 All intellectual property rights relating to relevant Software, technology, trademarks, copyrights etc. of V V Products or Services, and all information content associated with V V Products or Services (including but not limited to text, images, audio, video, charts, interface design, layout framework, relevant data or electronic documents, etc.) belong to V V or are authorized for use by V V, protected by law. Without prior written consent or authorization from V V, you may not in any form copy, disseminate, display, publish or release any of the above content yourself or license others to do so.

7.2 You understand and agree that content you post or upload while using V V Products or Services (including but not limited to texts, images, videos, audio and other forms of content and materials contained therein including music, sound, dialogue, visual images and other materials) shall not infringe any third-party rights, including intellectual property rights and reputation rights.

7.3 You understand and agree that with respect to content created or provided by you during the process of using V V Products or Services, you grant V V a global, free, irrevocable, non-exclusive, sublicensable right and license so that V V has the right to use, display, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish and distribute such content for the purpose of providing V V Services, including use in future V V Products and Services.

7.4 You confirm and guarantee that you have lawful rights to content you post or upload; otherwise, V V has the right to deal with such content in accordance with this Agreement, and you agree that any legal consequences arising thereby shall be borne solely by you.

sections.heading: VIII. Privacy Policy
sections.body: We collect, use, store and share your personal information in accordance with V V's Privacy Policy. Please read and understand V V's Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: IX. Termination
sections.body:
9.1 V V may at its sole discretion cease providing V V Products or Services to you at any time for any reason, including your breach of this Agreement, without assuming any liability to you.

9.2 You may stop using V V Products or Services at any time, cancel your account, and notify V V in advance; V V will process your cancellation request as soon as possible. Once a cancellation request is accepted, it cannot be revoked. You understand and agree that after acceptance of a cancellation request, V V has the right to handle account-related content and information (including but not limited to deletion) at its discretion without assuming any liability to you, and relevant services will terminate immediately.

9.3 After termination of this Agreement, if explicitly required by law, V V shall still maintain confidentiality obligations with respect to certain information previously entrusted to V V by you.

sections.heading: X. Force Majeure
sections.body: You understand and agree that during the process of using V V Products or Services, you may encounter force majeure risk factors causing interruption or termination of V V Products or Services. Force majeure refers to objective events that cannot be foreseen, overcome or avoided and that cause material impact on one or both parties, including but not limited to natural disasters such as floods, earthquakes, epidemics and storms, and social events such as wars, turmoil, government actions, etc. In the event of the above circumstances, V V will endeavor to cooperate with relevant units at the earliest possible time to achieve timely repairs; however, losses thus caused to you shall be exempted from V V's liability to the extent permitted by applicable laws and regulations.

sections.heading: XI. Third-Party Services
sections.body:
11.1 V V may provide partner service content within its Products or Services. With respect to partner service content, V V makes no express or implied warranty and assumes no joint legal liability. When using partner services, please comply with partner agreements or terms.

11.2 V V's Products or Services use third-party SDKs or similar applications, and the purpose and scope of collection and use of your information by these third-party services may differ from those of V V. When using third-party services, please read and understand relevant third-party agreement terms and privacy policies.

sections.heading: XII. Disclaimer of Liability
XIII. Breach Liability and Indemnification
sections.body:
13.1 If V V discovers or receives reports that you have violated this Agreement, V V has the right, without affecting its legal rights, to delete and/or block your user content at any time without notifying you, and take further measures determined by V V itself, including but not limited to restricting, suspending or terminating your right to use your account and the Service, restricting, suspending or terminating all or partial functions of V V Products or Services (including but not limited to removing connections with related contacts, deleting relevant data, documents, history and other content).

13.2 You agree that if any third party makes any claim or demand against V V and/or its affiliates due to information you upload, transmit or share through V V Products or Services, other functions you use of V V Products or Services, your breach of this Agreement or infringement upon any other person's rights, or if V V and/or its affiliates suffer any loss as a result, you shall indemnify them in full (including but not limited to reasonable attorneys' fees).

sections.heading: XIV. Effective Notices
sections.body:
14.1 Any notice sent by V V to you may be delivered through multiple channels, including email, public announcements in designated areas of the Platform, personal online notifications, mobile SMS or ordinary mail, etc., and such notice shall be deemed delivered or effective within seven (7) days from the date of sending.

14.2 You agree that any notice you send to V V shall be delivered through online or offline contact addresses, mailing addresses, emails or other notification methods publicly announced by V V Technology or otherwise approved by V V Technology.

sections.heading: XV. Miscellaneous
sections.body:
15.1 This Agreement and any disputes or claims arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by Singapore law. Any dispute, controversy or claim arising out of or relating to this Agreement (whether contractual, tortious or otherwise), including its existence, validity, interpretation, performance, breach or termination, shall be referred to and finally resolved by arbitration administered by the Singapore International Arbitration Centre ("SIAC") in accordance with the SIAC Arbitration Rules then in force, which rules are deemed to be incorporated by reference into this clause. The seat of arbitration shall be Singapore, the number of arbitrators shall be one (1), and the language of arbitration shall be English.

15.2 V V does not guarantee that any V V Product or Service is suitable or available for use in any other location, and access to such V V Products or Services from locations where content may be illegal is prohibited. Users choosing to access V V Products or Services from other locations do so entirely at their own risk and are responsible for compliance with applicable local laws. In regions where prohibited by law, this Agreement is void, and rights to access V V Products or Services in such regions shall be revoked. You agree that if you become located in such regions, you will immediately stop accessing or using V V Products or Services.

15.3 If any provision of this Agreement is held invalid or unenforceable, such provision may be severed and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

15.4 Any waiver by V V of its rights in respect of your breach of this Agreement shall not be construed as waiver of any other or subsequent similar breach(es) by you.

15.5 This Agreement supersedes all prior oral and written agreements, arrangements, understandings and communications between the Parties regarding the subject matter hereof.

15.6 You understand and agree that V V Technology has the right, pursuant to its business strategy and requirements, to transfer all rights and obligations under this Agreement to its affiliates or other third parties. After such transfer, this Agreement shall remain legally binding on each Party and their respective successors and assigns.

15.7 If any provision of this Agreement becomes wholly or partially invalid or unenforceable for any reason, the remaining provisions of this Agreement shall remain valid and binding.

15.8 You hereby confirm and declare that you have carefully read and fully understood the terms of this Agreement and accept all of the foregoing terms and conditions.

15.9 This Agreement is executed in English and may be translated into various language versions other than English. Where there is any conflict between the English version and any translation, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the English version shall prevail, unless expressly stated otherwise in the applicable translation version.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — V V AI
meta.description: V V Technology Pte. Ltd. Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Important Notice
sections.body:
Your trust is of paramount importance to us. We understand the importance of your personal information, and we will take appropriate security measures in accordance with laws and regulations to safeguard the security and controllability of your personal information. Therefore, V V Technology Pte. Ltd. (hereinafter "V V" or "we") has formulated this Privacy Policy (hereinafter "this Policy") and will continue to improve and update it.

When you interact with V V products and services, we are responsible for processing your personal information. This Policy describes how we collect, receive, use, store, share, transfer and process your personal information, and your rights in determining how we process information we collect or hold about you.

This Policy does not apply to third-party applications or software integrated with V V products or services (collectively, "Third-Party Services"). Before choosing to use any Third-Party Services, please read and fully understand the product features, terms of service and privacy policy of such Third-Party Services.

Please note that depending on the country in which you use V V products or services, specific national regulations may apply to you, and such regulations may be incorporated into this Policy in the form of appendices.

This Policy applies to users of V V products and services.

Before using V V products or services, please be sure to read and thoroughly understand this Policy, and use the relevant products or services only after confirming your full understanding and agreement. Once you start using V V products or services, it means that you have fully understood and agreed to this Policy.

sections.heading: I. How We Collect and Use Your Information
sections.body:
When you use V V products or services, we may need to collect and use your personal information, including the following two types:

1. To provide you with the basic functions of V V products or services, you must authorize us to collect and use necessary information. If you refuse to provide the corresponding information, you will not be able to use our products or services normally;

2. To provide you with additional functions of our products or services, you may choose to authorize us to collect and use certain information. If you refuse to provide such information, you will not be able to use the relevant additional functions or achieve the intended functional results, but this will not affect your normal use of the basic functions of our products or services.

We collect information you actively provide when registering and using V V services, information you authorize us to provide, information provided at the request of your enterprise/organization user, and information generated based on your use of V V products or services.

sections.heading: II. How We Use Cookies and Similar Technologies
sections.body:
To ensure normal operation of products, provide you with a more relaxed access experience, recommend content that may interest you, and improve our services, we may store or retrieve small data files on your device (such data files are sometimes referred to as "Cookies" or similar technologies).

We use Cookies and similar technologies to: record your preference settings, analyze website traffic, provide and measure advertising effectiveness, evaluate and improve your experience using our services, etc.

You can refuse or manage Cookies through your browser settings; however, please note that if you do so, you may not be able to use all features of V V products or services that rely on Cookies.

sections.heading: III. How We Disclose Your Information
sections.body:
We may disclose your information in the following circumstances:

1. With your prior consent, we may share your personal information with third parties.

2. We may share your personal information with our affiliated companies to provide, improve and personalize our services.

3. We may share your personal information with service providers who provide services on our behalf, such as data processing, sending emails or communications, providing customer service, providing advertising or analytics services.

4. We may disclose your information as required by law or where we reasonably believe it is necessary to respond to legal process.

5. If we believe it is necessary to protect the rights, property or safety of V V, our users or the public, we may disclose your information.

6. In the event of a merger, acquisition or asset sale, we may transfer your personal information.

sections.heading: IV. How We Protect Your Information
sections.body:
We take various security measures to protect your personal information, including but not limited to:

1. We use encryption technology (such as SSL) to protect data transmission.

2. We use various security technologies to protect your information from unauthorized access, use or disclosure.

3. We restrict access to personal information, and only employees who need the information to provide services and comply with the law can access it.

4. We regularly review our information collection, storage and processing practices to ensure we use reasonable security measures.

Please note that although we have taken the above reasonable measures to protect your information, the Internet is not a completely secure environment, and we may not always be able to guarantee the security of information.

sections.heading: V. How You Manage Your Information
sections.body:
You can access and manage your information in the following ways:

(1) Query, correct and supplement your information
As an administrator of an enterprise/organization user, you have the right to query, correct or supplement information about your enterprise/organization. As an individual user, you have the right to query, correct or supplement your information.

(2) Delete your information
In the following circumstances, you may submit a request to us to delete your personal information: (a) If our processing of personal information violates laws and regulations; (b) If we collect and use your personal information without your explicit consent; (c) If our processing of personal information seriously violates our agreement with you; (d) If you no longer use our products or services, or you have voluntarily cancelled your account; (e) If we permanently cease to provide products or services to you.

When you or we assist you in deleting relevant information, due to applicable laws and security technologies, we may not be able to immediately delete corresponding information from backup systems. We will securely store your personal information and isolate it from any further processing until backups can be cleared or anonymized.

(3) Cancel your account
When you leave your organization, are processed for offboarding by an administrator, or your organization dissolves the team, you can cancel your organizational identity account. After your account is cancelled, we will stop providing you with products or services, and will delete or anonymize your personal information in accordance with applicable legal requirements.

(4) Responding to your above requests
For security purposes, you may need to provide a written request or otherwise prove your identity. We may require you to verify your identity before processing your request.

For your reasonable requests, we generally do not charge fees, but for repeatedly duplicated, excessively unreasonable requests, we will charge appropriate fees. We may refuse requests for information not directly related to your identity, groundlessly repeated information, or requests requiring excessive technical means, creating risks to others' legitimate rights, or that are impractical.

sections.heading: VI. How We Handle Children's Information
sections.body:
In digital office, communication and collaboration activities, we presume that you have corresponding civil capacity. If you are a child, we require you to ask your parents or other guardians to carefully read this Privacy Policy and use our services or provide information to us only with the consent of your parents or other guardians.

For situations where children's personal information is collected based on the consent of parents or other guardians to use our products or services, we will only use, share, transfer or disclose such information where permitted by laws and regulations, with explicit consent of parents or other guardians, or as necessary to protect children.

If you are the parent or other guardian of a child, please pay attention to whether the child under your guardianship uses our services after obtaining your authorized consent. If you have questions about the personal information of the child under your guardianship, please contact us.

sections.heading: VII. How Your Information Is Transferred Globally
sections.body:
International data transfer is necessary for us to provide V V products or services and fulfill our contractual obligations regarding V V products or services to you. We will share your personal data globally with companies in our business group for the activities specified in this Policy. We may also subcontract data processing related to V V products or services to third parties in other countries, or share your personal data with third parties in other countries.

Our servers are currently located in Singapore, and your information may be processed on servers outside your country of residence. Data protection laws vary by country, and some countries provide more protection than others. Regardless of where your information is processed, we will apply the same protective measures described in this Policy. Where required by applicable law, we will provide adequate protection for your personal data through various means.

If you are an enterprise/organization user, your enterprise/organization will determine which servers will process and store your information. Your enterprise/organization may also choose to share your information with parties located outside your country of residence. Your enterprise/organization will protect your personal data and comply with applicable laws regarding such transfers.

sections.heading: VIII. How This Privacy Policy Is Updated
sections.body:
We reserve the right to update or modify this Policy from time to time. If our privacy policy changes, we will publish the latest version of the privacy policy on V V products or services or through other appropriate means, with the effective date indicated. You should proactively review the contents of this Policy. If we make significant changes to the privacy policy, we may also send change notifications to you individually through your contact information, and you should pay attention to receiving them.

Significant changes referred to in this Policy include but are not limited to: (1) Significant changes in our service model, such as the purpose of processing personal information, the types of personal information processed, and the manner of using personal information; (2) Significant changes in our control, organizational structure, etc., such as controller changes caused by mergers, acquisitions and reorganizations; (3) Changes in the main objects of personal information sharing, transfer or public disclosure; (4) Significant changes in your rights regarding personal information processing and the exercise methods thereof; (5) Changes in the responsible department, contact information and complaint channels for handling user information security; (6) User information security impact assessment reports indicating high risk.

sections.heading: IX. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions, feedback or inquiries about this Policy or the use of personal information, please contact us through the contact information provided on our official website (vvai.com).

sections.heading: X. Language Versions
sections.body: This Policy is written in English and may be translated into multiple languages other than English. If there is any inconsistency between the English text and any translation, the English text shall prevail to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, unless expressly stated otherwise in the applicable translation.

moduleList.label: Modules
moduleList.body: Every module works together seamlessly — no integrations, no silos, no extra cost.

work.label: V V Work
work.headline: One-Stop Smart Collaboration Platform
work.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Intelligence

screenshots.headline: Seamless Enterprise Management: Organize Your Company and Organization From Startup to MNC Effortlessly
screenshots.subtitle: From lean startups to large multinationals, V V Work adapts to any organizational scale — giving you clear hierarchy management, role-based access, and unified visibility across every department and subsidiary.

screenshots.headline: Comprehensive Human Resource Management: Smarter Recruitment, Flexible and Compliant Payroll System
screenshots.subtitle: Streamline your entire HR lifecycle — post jobs, screen candidates with AI, run compliant multi-region payrolls, manage attendance, and conduct performance reviews, all from a single platform.

screenshots.headline: Data-Result Driven Work Management: Seamless Online Collaboration for Better Efficiency
screenshots.subtitle: Set OKRs, break them into trackable milestones, and monitor real-time progress across every team. AI analytics surface bottlenecks early so your organization stays focused and results remain measurable.

screenshots.headline: Unified Communication & Collaboration: Timely, Efficient, and Intelligent for Every Team
screenshots.subtitle: One-click meetings, intelligent group messaging, real-time document co-editing, smart calendar planning, and secure V Drive file access — every tool your team needs to communicate and collaborate, all in one place.

features.title: AI Work Agent
features.description: Super-intelligent AI agent that automates workflows, drafts documents, and surfaces insights on demand.

features.title: OKR & Project Tracking
features.description: Set goals, track milestones, and keep every team aligned with transparent real-time progress boards.

features.title: Encrypted IM & Meetings
features.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging, video conferencing, and smart room booking — all in one place.

features.title: HR Management Suite
features.description: Attendance, payroll, onboarding, performance reviews — the full employee lifecycle in one platform.

features.title: Smart Workflows
features.description: Configurable approval flows and process automation that cut manual work by up to 60%.

features.title: Live Analytics
features.description: Real-time dashboards with AI-generated summaries so leadership always has the full picture.

education.label: V V Education
education.headline: One-stop Educational AI Solutions for All Scenarios
education.subline: The First Agentic AI Operating System for School Ecosystems
education.tagline: Scaling Education with an AI-Driven Performance Engine

screenshots.headline: The Next Generation of School Management: AI-Powered, Human-Connected
screenshots.subtitle: Powering education through AI—streamlining back-office operations and connecting headquarters to parents in one seamless ecosystem.

screenshots.headline: The All-in-One Operating System Driving Growth and Efficiency
screenshots.subtitle: Streamline the entire school enrollment lifecycle—from branding, sign-ups and billing to after-enrollment support—with AI-powered automation.

screenshots.headline: B2C Smart Teaching and Learning
screenshots.subtitle: Empower educators and inspire students with an AI-integrated LMS that automates lesson scheduling, teaching planning, personalizes study paths, and provides 24/7 intelligent tutoring assistants.

screenshots.headline: Home-School Smart IM Communication
screenshots.subtitle: Bridge the gap with an AI-powered IM ecosystem that delivers real-time student updates, automated event reminders, and instant multilingual translation for seamless parent-teacher collaboration.

features.title: Home-School Collaboration
features.description: Bridge the gap between institutions and families with real-time updates, messages, and shared learning plans.

features.title: AI Teaching Assistant
features.description: Personalised AI-powered teaching assistance that adapts to each student's pace and unique style.

features.title: Class Management
features.description: Scheduling, attendance tracking, homework distribution, and grade management — all automated.

features.title: Learning Reports
features.description: Periodic AI-generated progress reports for parents, students, and educators across multiple institutions.

features.title: Course Sales Platform
features.description: Built-in enrollment, payment, and referral management tools to grow your education business.

features.title: Smart Notifications
features.description: Automated alerts keep parents, students, and teachers informed — without the information overload.

life.label: V V Life
life.headline: Your Personal and Reliable Smart Lifestyle Planner
life.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Convenience

screenshots.headline: Life assistant home
screenshots.subtitle: Your intelligent life hub that understands your preferences, learns your routines, and proactively organizes everything you need — from daily tasks to personal goals. V V Life turns your intentions into instant actions with natural language commands, creating a seamless experience where technology serves you invisibly.

screenshots.headline: Life services
screenshots.subtitle: Access a curated ecosystem of lifestyle services — dining, travel, home care, finance, and more — all integrated in one place. With smart recommendations based on your habits and preferences, finding and booking the right service is always just one tap away.

screenshots.headline: Personal planner
screenshots.subtitle: Your AI-powered life strategist that helps you plan, prioritize, and achieve your personal goals. From daily to-dos to long-term aspirations, V V Life creates smart schedules, suggests optimal timing, and keeps you on track with gentle, context-aware reminders.

screenshots.headline: Life calendar
screenshots.subtitle: Unify your entire life in one intelligent calendar — work meetings, family events, health appointments, social plans, and learning sessions all synchronized. Smart conflict detection, automatic travel time calculations, and AI-generated suggestions ensure you never miss what matters.

features.title: AI Life Assistant
features.description: A proactive digital companion that anticipates your needs and acts on your words before you ask.

features.title: Dining & Travel
features.description: Smart restaurant discovery, reservation management, trip itineraries, and local service access.

features.title: Life Calendar
features.description: Personal and family scheduling unified in one view — work, social, health, and learning events.

features.title: Connected Services
features.description: One-click access to a curated ecosystem of lifestyle services including finance, transport, and home.

features.title: Private & Secure
features.description: Your personal data stays private. End-to-end encryption keeps every activity and preference protected.

features.title: Invisible Companion
features.description: Runs quietly in the background, surfaces smart suggestions exactly when you need them, never when you don't.

notice.title: V V Life is launching soon
notice.description: We're putting the finishing touches on this suite. Join the waitlist to be notified when it's ready.

health.label: V V Health
health.headline: Your Reliable, Quick-Response Health Manager
health.subline: Connecting You to the "V" World of Health

screenshots.headline: Health overview
screenshots.subtitle: Your comprehensive health command center that brings together all vital metrics, medical records, upcoming appointments, and wellness insights in one unified dashboard. V V Health uses AI to identify patterns, track progress toward health goals, and deliver personalized recommendations based on your complete health profile.

screenshots.headline: Appointments
screenshots.subtitle: Streamline your healthcare journey with intelligent appointment booking that connects you to the right specialists at the right time. The system understands your medical history, suggests optimal departments, manages scheduling conflicts, and provides timely reminders — ensuring you never miss important check-ups or treatments.

screenshots.headline: Health records
screenshots.subtitle: Securely centralize your entire medical history — lab results, prescriptions, imaging reports, vaccination records, and doctor's notes — in one encrypted, accessible location. Share records instantly with authorized healthcare providers, track treatment progress, and maintain a complete, portable health archive that travels with you.

screenshots.headline: Risk detection
screenshots.subtitle: Leverage AI-powered health analytics that continuously monitor your vitals, behaviors, and medical history to detect early warning signs and health risks before they become serious. Receive personalized prevention strategies, evidence-based health recommendations, and proactive alerts that empower you to take control of your well-being.

features.title: Health Overview
features.description: A comprehensive health dashboard that aggregates all your metrics, records, and appointments in one view.

features.title: Appointment Booking
features.description: Quick and easy doctor booking with intelligent scheduling that respects your availability.

features.title: Health Records
features.description: Centralised and secure storage for all medical history, test results, prescriptions, and documents.

features.title: AI Risk Detection
features.description: Pattern-based AI alerts that identify health risks early — prevention is better than cure.

features.title: Care Coordination
features.description: Connect seamlessly with healthcare providers, family caregivers, and specialists within the platform.

features.title: Health Resources
features.description: Curated, reliable health education content that empowers you to make informed wellness decisions.
